name: Interloom
oneliner: Enterprise knowledge infrastructure for AI agents — captures undocumented expert decision-making and converts it into permanent corporate memory that agents use to execute complex workflows accurately.
finserv: Commerzbank (production customer — reduced documentation gap from 50% to 5%) and Zurich Insurance both confirmed as enterprise customers. Also JLL and Volkswagen.
team: Fabian Jakobi (CEO). Backed by DN Capital (lead), Bek Ventures, Air Street Capital.
thesis: Interloom solves the 'why does my agent give wrong answers inside my institution' problem — a real blocker to regulated deployment. The Commerzbank result is unusually concrete ROI evidence for a seed-stage company, and the finserv customer base is the strongest of any EU-based new entry this cycle.
evidence: German startup Interloom lands €14.2 million Seed funding
